00033 module.  An independent module is a module which is not derived from
00034 or based on this library.  If you modify this library, you may extend

00038 
00039 package java.lang;
00040 
00060 public class Object
00061 {
00062     // WARNING: Object is a CORE class in the bootstrap cycle. See the comments
00063     // in vm/reference/java/lang/Runtime for implications of this fact.
00064 
00065     // Many JVMs do not allow for static initializers in this class,
00066     // hence we do not use them in the default implementation.
00067 
00068     // Some VM's rely on the order that these methods appear when laying
00069     // out their internal structure.  Therefore, do not haphazardly
00070     // rearrange these methods.
00071 
00083     // This could be implicit, but then javadoc would not document it!
00084     public Object()
00085     {
00086 
00087     }
00088 
00100     public native final Class getClass();
00101 
00137     public int hashCode()
00138     {
00139         return System.identityHashCode(this);
00140     }
00141 
00185     public boolean equals(Object obj)
00186     {
00187         return this == obj;
00188     }
00189 
00218     public String toString()
00219     {
00220         return getClass().getName() + '@' + Integer.toHexString(hashCode());
00221     }
00222 
00248     public native final void notify() throws IllegalMonitorStateException;
00249 
00274     public native final void notifyAll() throws IllegalMonitorStateException;
00275 
00316     public final void wait(long ms, int ns)
00317         throws IllegalMonitorStateException, InterruptedException
00318     {
00319         if (ms < 0 || ns < 0 || ns > 999999)
00320             throw new IllegalArgumentException("argument out of range");
00321 
00322         _wait(ms, ns);
00323     }
00324 
00365     public final void wait(long ms)
00366         throws IllegalMonitorStateException, InterruptedException
00367     {
00368         wait(ms, 0);
00369     }
00370 
00409     public final void wait()
00410         throws IllegalMonitorStateException, InterruptedException
00411     {
00412         wait(0, 0);
00413     }
00414 
00460     protected void finalize() throws Throwable
00461     {
00462 
00463     }
00464 
00487     private native final void _wait(long ms, int ns)
00488         throws IllegalMonitorStateException, InterruptedException;
00489 } // class Object
